S.FORM: Ron Bonham sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1942, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 5, Ron Bonham, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron Œ≤onƒßam s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ron Œ≤onƒßam, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
